title: Baggage Porters and Bellhops
description: Handle baggage for travelers at transportation terminals or for guests at hotels or similar establishments.

tasks.text: Receive and mark baggage by completing and attaching claim checks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Greet incoming guests and escort them to their rooms.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Transport guests about premises and local areas, or arrange for transportation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain clean lobbies or entrance areas for travelers or guests.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Transfer luggage, trunks, and packages to and from rooms, loading areas, vehicles, or transportation terminals, by hand or using baggage carts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Supply guests or travelers with directions, travel information, and other information, such as available services and points of interest.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Explain the operation of room features, such as locks, ventilation systems, and televisions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assist travelers and guests with disabilities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Deliver messages and room service orders, and run errands for guests.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Pick up and return items for laundry and valet service.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Act as part of the security team at transportation terminals, hotels, or similar establishments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Compute and complete charge slips for services rendered and maintain records.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Page guests in hotel lobbies, dining rooms, or other areas.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Set up conference rooms, display tables, racks, or shelves, and arrange merchandise displays for sales personnel.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inspect guests' rooms to ensure that they are adequately stocked, orderly, and comfortable.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Arrange for shipments of baggage, express mail, and parcels by providing weighing and billing services.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.
